lists.3: Time synchronisation with server 1 (GDC) activated and with GPS if no service on server 1 is active
lists.4: Time synchronisation with server 1 (GDC), with GPS or PLGW

lists.0: No retry until next ON cycle
Device and failure type ODB codding
lists.20: circuit short to ground or open
lists.21: circuit short to battery or open
lists.38: signal rate of change below threshold
lists.39: signal rate of change above threshold
lists.40: signal bias level oor/ zero adjustment failure
lists.101: signal has too few transitions / events
lists.102: signal has too many transitions / events
lists.130: alive / sequence counter incorrect / not updated
lists.131: value of signal protection calculation incorrect

DTCExtendedData.Mileage.comment: Description of the extendedData Mileage (use by Failure Page to decode data)

DTCExtendedData.AgingCounter.comment: Description of the extendedData AgingCounter (use by Failure Page to decode data)

DTCExtendedData.DTCOccurrenceCounter.comment: Description of the extendedData DTCOccurenceCounter (use by Failure Page to decode data)

lists.0: No automatic eCall has ever been detected before

ECUprogressingTimeN_Cs.comment: Time until transmission of next Consecutive Frame

ECUprogressingTimeN_Br.comment: Time until transmission of next Flow Control

lists.0: End of Life of the Battery
The system shall launch automatic eCall directly on {Crash_Detected} signal
lists.1: The system shall apply crash detection algorithms defined in [CRASH-MNG]

NETWORK_MONITORING.NOKtoOK.comment: representing last time the TCU network status changed from NOK to OK

NETWORK_MONITORING.OKtoNOK.comment: representing last time the TCU network status changed from OK to NOK

lists.0: Outgoing MSD by SMS not blocked

CUSTOMER_REQUEST.manualEcallByCombinatio.comment: manual eCall by combination of short push

lists.0: False (callback request by sms is not allowed)
lists.1: True (callback request by sms is allowed)

lists.17: Control stopped by Control option parameter set to 'Stop control'
